steps.title: sentinel node "PROMPT_RECEIVED_850e37ea2465" never appeared — fake-agent did not receive AGENT_PROMPT_FILE
electron main never exited after SIGKILL
startFileWatching did not recover after relaunch
daemon graph did not recover after relaunch
sentinel node "PROMPT_RECEIVED_850e37ea2465" not recovered after relaunch
tmux session Aki not torn down by close_agent
